label: Seamline Concord
description: Seamline Concord rises along a fault-limned escarpment where Lacrymara’s luminous seam-lines run in steady, copper-white bands beneath perpetual twilight. Its terraces and towers are faced in dark basalt glass and overlaid with electrostatically pinned dust, giving every cornice and buttress a muted, reflective grit. The city’s principal avenues follow calibrated sightlines to the auroral girdle, and their paving incorporates mirror-slag inlays that maintain the system’s navigational geometry at street level. Broad cistern-plazas collect the shallow sea’s reflective particulates, serving as civic basins and optical markers within the hushlit lattice.
